integration_validation_v2.evidence: exports.rs:815 validate_llm_evidence_pack_manifest + :873 build_llm_evidence_pack_manifest enforce required files, source anchors, redaction flags, deterministic order, .GOV rejection; test atelier_core_data_tests.rs:7027 exercises happy path + 4 negative paths (missing required file, missing anchor, unredacted-sensitive, .GOV path). MT is a portable format/validation contract with no managed-resource surface, so sr2=NA

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-072 [Core-Data-Intake] LLM Evidence Pack Export Contract -- Preserve CKC spin-off/LLM pack format as a strict deterministic model-consumable export contract with required files
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for LLM Evidence Pack Export Contract
